extra.reason: Fixed: recoverStuckJobs now routes stalled jobs through retry/terminal logic — exhausted attempts -> failed, retryable -> pending with jittered backoff runAt (breaks hot retry loop). Regression tests in test/MongoJobQueue.test.ts.
Added MongoJobQueue.batchHeartbeat(jobIds): single updateMany over active jobs, N->1 writes per keepalive cycle. Tests cover multi-job extend, completed-job exclusion, empty no-op.

Confirmed real TOCTOU: claimAndProcess checked activeCount<concurrency then awaited claimNext then incremented; a push burst drove N concurrent claims past the gate, overshooting the per-instance cap (atomic per-job claim does not bound own concurrency). Fix: reserve slot synchronously (pre-increment, rollback if no job/err); poll loop now routes through claimAndProcess removing duplicate raced path. Regression: test/JobQueueConcurrency.test.ts (cap=2 and cap=1 under burst).

Added backoff to EnqueueOptions (backoff/backoffDelay/backoffMaxDelay), persisted on job doc. fail() retry branch now sets runAt = now + jittered backoff (was: unchanged -> immediate re-claim storm). Shared retryBackoffMs helper (src/backends/backoff.ts) used by both fail() and the reaper; removed duplicate recoveryBackoffMs. Tests: backoff.test.ts (unit) + MongoJobQueue fail() backoff cases. README + types updated.
